final:
// // When ready is HIGH, select from filter_select_balance; otherwise, select from filter_select_identify.
module top_module(
input ready,
input [1:0]filter_select_balance,
input [1:0]filter_select_identify,
output  reg [1:0] filter_select_out
    );always@(*)
    begin
        if(!ready)
        begin
            filter_select_out = filter_select_balance;       
        end
        else
        begin
         filter_select_out = filter_select_identify;       
        end
    end
    
    
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When ready is HIGH, select from filter_select_balance; otherwise, select from filter_select_identify.
